<@&1070471163219824730> <@&688101493978562687> <@&836981603216654336> Hey all, quick ping on the EraE history format spec: https://github.com/eth-clients/e2store-format-specs/pull/16

We’ve had this open for a bit now, and as mentioned on ACD in February, sepolia history exports are available for testing here: https://data.ethpandaops.io/erae/sepolia/

Wanted to check in:
    •    does anyone have feedback or concerns on the spec as it stands?
    •    if not, it would be great if client teams could start looking into implementations

Haven't tagged Nethermind and Nimbus as they have PRs that can import the files above.

author: s1na
content: Right I now remember you weren’t interested in era compat. Won’t tag in future 👍
